name: template-cancel
description: Retrieve email composing guidelines for meeting cancellations. Returns structured policy (required elements, tone, structure, constraints, example) that you use as instructions when composing the email — do NOT send the policy itself to the recipient. Supports 'generate', 'save', and 'reset' actions.

inputs.sender_name: string? (required for generate — the person canceling)
inputs.meeting_subject: string? (required for generate — the meeting topic)
inputs.meeting_time: string? (required for generate — the scheduled time)
inputs.reason: string? (optional for generate — brief reason for cancellation)
inputs.offer_reschedule: boolean? (optional for generate — whether to offer rescheduling, defaults to true)
inputs.custom_policy: string? (required for save — the policy to store)
